case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JACQUELINE C BRUNO

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO, JACQUELINE C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-13-2014
